name: Maintenance Team
description: Sustain and improve existing systems through reviews, optimization, and debt reduction

responsibilities: Review PRs for quality, maintainability, and patterns
Identify code smells and refactoring opportunities
Enforce coding standards and best practices
Improve test coverage for critical paths
Fix flaky tests and test infrastructure
Add regression tests for reported bugs
Reduce bundle size and load times
Investigate error logs and crash reports

handoffs.artifact: Bug fix with root cause analysis
handoffs.gate: Fix addresses root cause (not symptom); regression test included

handoffs.artifact: Identified coverage gaps and test improvements
handoffs.gate: Coverage gaps mapped to specific modules; priorities assigned

handoffs.artifact: Reproducible test cases for reported bugs
handoffs.gate: Test reliably reproduces the bug; environment documented

overlap_resolution.code_quality: code-reviewer owns style and patterns; performance-engineer owns efficiency
overlap_resolution.bug_investigation: debugger leads investigation; test-engineer creates reproducer
